item.title: Fuck cancer
item.description:
You were always more beautiful than me
You loved dirty comics and humor. Drinking wine and telling horrible jokes were like second nature to you
You loved life and fought so fucking hard for it
After the cancer spread you fought even harder
I don't know what's going to happen now without you . How will I ever begin to tell your niece about you. How will I ever stop crying. I wasn't even there to say goodbye. Bye little sister. Rest easy now and I'm so sorry
item.dc:creator: kimmycat57

item.title: If you live in M’urica, how many worst and best-case scenarios do you have ready to go?
item.description:
If you are not a descendant of Royalty or Nobility, ignoring the electoral process is a profound DISRESPECT for your ancestors who gave sweat, blood, and tears for their future descendants' RIGHT to choose - which is the freedom to make decisions about one's life and circumstances without interference from others. It is an important aspect of individual liberty. Examples of the right to choose include: Choosing a school for a child in a non-segregated system Exercising the right to privacy, such as the right to have an abortion Choosing what to do with one's body Choosing how to live one's life Choosing who represents them politically Choosing who would lead the society one belongs to
He got lucky. Inherited a great Economy, trashed it, was kicked out, made and still making a fuss, and in less than we could have imagined Bidenomics kept us up floating.
Racism, misogyny, xenophobia, homophobia, transphobia, and ableism are proven to be shir for society. Do better. Don't cut your nose to spite your face.
item.dc:creator: AmericanJoy

item.title: My first attempt at jumping
item.description: Two years ago I was in a car accident and acquired a brain injury. They told me I probably wouldn't walk again. This is my first attempt at jumping! #disability #inspirational #awesome

item.title: Saturday MEME Phone Clearing Dump (#420)
item.description:
1. It do be like that
2. Me who just wanted some cake
3. Still one of the best pre-fight exchanges
4. Mugshots used to be way more descriptive...
5. Civil War II when?
6. Women be like
7. You're god damn right, lady
8. *sigh* "We're not so different, you and I
9. JUST SHUT UP, BRO
10. Escape attempt foiled again!
11
12. Shotgun yer beer they said....
13. Awwww, so romantic
14. HOLD UP BUDDY, You've been scrolling for too long so I gotta slap you with a puppy tax "Give up, Barkanin! I have the higher ground!"
15. Thank you for making it to the end of this dump, I hope you were thoroughly entertained! I would like to share with you that I'm making a wacky game called Do Not Press The Button, and it's humor and style are kind of inspired by the Stanley Parable. I'm working on tons of fun stuff to do in it! For example: JOINING THE CHAIR REVOLUTION (yes there is a whole storyline where you help the chairs against the oppression of the evil tables! If you liked the humor in this dump, you would probably like the game. Please wishlist: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ Thank you for supporting indie devs!
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Ilan Shor is an Israeli-born Moldovan pro-Russian oligarch and politician
item.description:
https://mastodon.social/@giocomai/113406895706211310 "Ziarul de Gardă once again penetrated Ilan Shor’s network. For three months we have documented from the inside with the help of a hidden camera how money circulates and how people working for Ilan Shor are recruited and lured to serve Moscow. The stakes – hijacking the country’s European course by compromising the October 20 referendum and the organized vote for a Shor-backed candidate to be announced just one day before the elections. For three months, an undercover ZdG reporter, acting under a false identity, attended events organized by Shor’s people: so-called protests before or after court hearings of Shor’s corrupt politicians, electoral meetings with one of Shor’s candidates, whom the oligarch’s people believe will be eliminated from the race, and even handed out leaflets with false information about the European Union and the Eurasian Union. The Shor network opened an account for the ZdG reporter in a Russian state bank using personal data that does NOT exist in reality. With the help of ZdG’s technical team, an identity card with made-up data was “cloned”, and in September, after almost two months in the service of Shor and Moscow, the ZdG reporter received the promised “iablociki”, i.e. 15 thousand Russian roubles, equivalent to about 2.7 thousand MDL (140 Eur). After all, the reporter ended up with less money for her “work” after being charged several fees along the way, both by the banks involved in the transactions and by the individuals who coordinated it. In October, another 15 thousand Russian rubles were transferred to the same account. Throughout this period, the ZdG reporter received several phone calls “from Moscow” thanking her for her work. The scheme operated even on the day when the police and prosecutor’s office announced that they had dismantled a national bribing network. They had discovered that around 130 thousand Moldovans had been bribed for their vote on October 20, however this scheme was still in effect after the law enforcement bodies had uncovered it. Two years after the publication of the investigation “Protesters to rent”, in which we showed that the participants in the protests organized by the former “Shor” party were paid, ZdG has penetrated again into Ilan Shor’s network. We found a similar reality, where money dictates and fuels any protest movement and spirit. But the differences are at the level of organization and circulation of money." The youtube links are https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=eN6t02HanMs https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=SHfWZmBe02s
https://mastodon.social/@giocomai/113406935286999527
item.dc:creator: GlobalImageServiceCat

item.dc:creator: chukyrlaw

item.title: Oh FFS
item.description:
I’ve long since come to believe that a majority of Supreme Court Justices do not give a shit about the Constitution they are supposed to uphold. But they used to *pretend* to care, if only to keep the grift going. Alito stopped caring.
Wow! Well, maybe it wasn’t widely reported when it occurred about seven years ago because the oath was a nothingburger?
No doubt Alito would say that—like the 14th Amendment—Article I, Section 9 of the Constitution doesn’t do what it says it does. But I think a Justice that does not give a damn about the law shouldn’t be making decisions about the law. We know the GOP won’t rein him in; now is the time to elect Harris and a Democratic House and Senate to start fixing this lawless Court. Screenshots from this article: https://abovethelaw.com/2024/10/sam-alito-got-knighted-just-like-the-founding-fathers-explicitly-made-unconstitutional/ Which is based on reporting in this article: https://nymag.com/intelligencer/article/justice-alitos-royalist-cosplay.html
item.dc:creator: wingineer

item.title: These Are The Women Around The US Who Are Proudly "Canceling Out" Their Dad's Votes For Donald Trump
item.description:
https://www.tiktok.com/@jeannereneewrites/video/7428279876874013982 Some are cordial - “Just a father and daughter cancelling out each others vote,” says one clip showing a dad and daughter shaking hands before casting divergent votes.
When Trump surrendered to authorities last year on charges that he illegally plotted to overturn the results of the 2020 election in Georgia, Heather texted her dad a photo of Trump’s stony-faced booking shot. “My dad responded only with ‘my hero!’” she recalls. Heather and her dad are not estranged, but with three Trump election cycles, she said their relationship is hanging on by a thread. “I’ve shared my feelings with my father, and he mocked my feelings,” she said. “He told me, ‘You are making decisions on your feelings?’ His tone was condescending and patronizing. I have not brought the topic up since that phone call, approximately three years ago.” https://www.buzzfeed.com/brittanywong/daughter-canceling-out-dads-vote-tiktok https://19thnews.org/2024/11/women-cancel-votes-husband-trump/
Some are little tougher ... ‘MAGA stole my father from us.’ “My father traded the rights and safety of his two daughters and four granddaughters for low gas prices,” she wrote in her video... “My father has always been GOP. But over the past nine years, he has morphed into a closed-minded, aggressive MAGA type who spends hours a day online, doing his ‘own research,’” she told HuffPost, referencing Trump’s “Make America Great Again” movement. “I really feel like MAGA stole my father from us.” https://www.tiktok.com/@thezencherry/video/7428618121293958430
item.dc:creator: Jbelkin

item.dc:creator: yuzupyon

item.title: Eva Longoria Has Made Over $12 Million Off ‘John Wick’ and Still Gets Checks 10 Years After Her $6 Million Saved the Movie: ‘My Only Mistake’ Was Not Doing the Sequels
item.description: Eva Longoria is still getting checks over 10 years later from her $6 million investment in 2014’s “John Wick,” It was revealed earlier this month that Longoria quietly stepped in to close the movie’s $6 million financing gap less than 24 hours before production would’ve shut down entirely. Essentially, there’d be no “John Wick” franchise without Longoria’s contribution that saved the original film. “That is accurate. By the way, I was in my infancy,” Longoria said while talking about her “John Wick” investment for the first time. “My bankroll was very new, and it was a lot of money, and I was like, ‘So how does it work?’ I had no idea. I would love to say I was an investment genius and I just knew and I calculated my risk. No, none of that. I was like, ‘What do you mean gap financing?’ But something that I’ve learned, looking back, I love investing in people. You can tell me you’re opening a chicken farm, but if you’re fucking passionate about it and you’ve done the work and know the market, I mean, [directors Chad Stahelski and David Leitch] did their work. They put in their 10,000 hours as stunt guys and second unit directors; they had seen all the bad movies and knew how to make a good one. It was that. They were undeniably passionate and I knew they were going to make an undeniable product.” When asked if she’s still getting checks from her “John Wick” investment, Longoria answered: “Yes. What I’m pissed off about is I wasn’t connected to the rest of them. This was a one-time thing. That was the gamble. But that was my only mistake, not being attached to all of the films.” The success of 2014’s “John Wick” spawned a franchise that has since grossed $1 billion across four movies. While Longoria was not involved with any of the sequels, the franchise’s enduring popularity keeps the 2014 original in constant viewing rotation so the checks continue to come in for her. So how much as she made? “You know, I would have to check. More than double [$6 million], for sure,” Longoria answered. As the secret hero behind the “John Wick” franchise, Longoria said it’s always fun to run into the film’s directors or star Keanu Reeves around Hollywood. “[Keanu and I] ran into each other because of his girlfriend, Alexandra. We know her through some friends, and we met her and Keanu at an art event,” Longoria recalled. “Keanu said, ‘I’d love to take you to dinner; we should celebrate 10 years.’ So we toasted to ‘John Wick.'” https://variety.com/2024/film/news/eva-longoria-john-wick-checks-1236196504/
item.dc:creator: Jbelkin
